criteria.label: Artifact Validity
criteria.description: The output uses the expected mini-app JSON shape and contains complete HTML.

criteria.label: Interactivity
criteria.description: The app has functional controls, state transitions, and a real primary workflow.

criteria.label: Responsive Layout
criteria.description: The layout works on mobile and desktop without text or controls overflowing.

criteria.label: Runtime Health
criteria.description: Preview loads without console errors and key interactions do not throw.

criteria.label: Publish Readiness
criteria.description: External API, storage, and asset choices work after publish, not only in preview.

criteria.label: Visual Fit
criteria.description: The UI matches the artifact's domain and avoids generic decorative clutter.
